Uses of Interface
com.irurueta.navigation.inertial.calibration.GyroscopeNoiseRootPsdSource

  • Packages that use GyroscopeNoiseRootPsdSource 
    Package Description
    com.irurueta.navigation.inertial.calibration
    Contains classes to perform calibration of accelerometers, gyroscopes and magnetometers.
    com.irurueta.navigation.inertial.calibration.generators
    Contains classes to generate measurements required for the calibration of accelerometers, gyroscopes and magnetometers after detecting static and dynamic intervals.
    com.irurueta.navigation.inertial.calibration.intervals
    Contains classes to find static (body of device remains static) or dynamic intervals (some movement or force is applied to body of device) for accelerometer, gyroscope and magnetometer sensors.
    com.irurueta.navigation.inertial.calibration.noise
    Contains classes related to noise level estimation.

    • Uses of GyroscopeNoiseRootPsdSource in com.irurueta.navigation.inertial.calibration

      A source of estimated gyroscope noise root PSD.

    • Uses of GyroscopeNoiseRootPsdSource in com.irurueta.navigation.inertial.calibration.generators

      Classes in com.irurueta.navigation.inertial.calibration.generators that implement GyroscopeNoiseRootPsdSource 
      Modifier and Type Class Description
      class  AccelerometerAndGyroscopeMeasurementsGenerator
      Generates measurements for the calibration of accelerometers and gyroscopes by alternating static and dynamic intervals where device is kept static or moved.
      class  AccelerometerGyroscopeAndMagnetometerMeasurementsGenerator
      Generates measurements for the calibration of accelerometers and gyroscopes by alternating static and dynamic intervals where device is kept static or moved.
      class  GyroscopeMeasurementsGenerator
      Generates measurements for the calibration of gyroscopes by alternating static and dynamic intervals where device is kept static or moved.

    • Uses of GyroscopeNoiseRootPsdSource in com.irurueta.navigation.inertial.calibration.intervals

      Classes in com.irurueta.navigation.inertial.calibration.intervals that implement GyroscopeNoiseRootPsdSource 
      Modifier and Type Class Description
      class  AngularSpeedTriadStaticIntervalDetector
      This detector is in charge of determining when a static period of angular speed measurements starts and finishes.

    • Uses of GyroscopeNoiseRootPsdSource in com.irurueta.navigation.inertial.calibration.noise

      Classes in com.irurueta.navigation.inertial.calibration.noise that implement GyroscopeNoiseRootPsdSource 
      Modifier and Type Class Description
      class  AccumulatedAngularSpeedMeasurementNoiseEstimator
      Estimates accumulated angular speed noise variances and PSD's (Power Spectral Densities) along with their average values.
      class  AccumulatedAngularSpeedTriadNoiseEstimator
      Estimates accumulated angular speed noise variances and PSD's (Power Spectral Densities) along with their average values.
      class  AccumulatedBodyKinematicsNoiseEstimator
      Estimates accumulated acceleration and angular speed noise variances and PSD's (Power Spectral Densities) along with their average values.
      class  WindowedAngularSpeedMeasurementNoiseEstimator
      Estimates measurement noise variances and PSD's (Power Spectral Density) along with angular speed average value for a windowed amount of samples.
      class  WindowedAngularSpeedTriadNoiseEstimator
      Estimates angular speed noise variances and PSD's (Power Spectral Densities) along with the gyroscope average values for a windowed amount of samples.
      class  WindowedBodyKinematicsNoiseEstimator
      Estimates accelerometer and angular speed noise variances and PSD's (Power Spectral Densities) along with their average values for a windowed amount of samples.
